Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, Erg6/SMT family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. Erg6/SMT family. {ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU01022}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=24-methylidenelophenol + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = (Z)-24-ethylidenelophenol + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:21044, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:29107, ChEBI:CHEBI:33203, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789; EC=2.1.1.143;
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Catalyzes the methyl transfer from S-adenosyl-methionine to the methylene group of 24-methylene lophenol to form 24-ethylidene lophenol.
